chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2955 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قُلْتُ دَخَلْتُ بِعُمْرَةٍ فَأَيْنَ أَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ فَقَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْعَقَبَةِ عَقَبَةِ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ » قُلْتُ أَيْنَ عَقَبَةُ اَلْمَدَنِيِّينَ قَالَ «بِحِيَالِ اَلْقَصَّارِينَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2955 - In a narration from Al-Fudhayl, he said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "I entered Mecca for Umrah; where should I stop the Talbiyah?"
Imam (as) said: "At the height of the Aqabah of the Madinites."
I asked: "Where is the Aqabah of the Madinites?"
Imam (as) replied: "At the location of the Qassarun (the dyers' area)."
